elements.label: Description
elements.value: The jar container defines the physical play area. Items collide with left, right, and bottom walls.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/properties/container.schema.json, set contt_left to {{contt_left}}]
Set CONTAINER_LEFT to {{contt_left}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/properties/container.schema.json, set contt_right to {{contt_right}}]
Set CONTAINER_RIGHT to {{contt_right}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/properties/container.schema.json, set contt_bottom to {{contt_bottom}}]
Set CONTAINER_BOTTOM to {{contt_bottom}} pixels.
